title: Agent Check-In
description: Periodic check-in payload sent from agent to control plane.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number for deduplication.

results.description: Results for all checks executed since the last check-in.

pending_actions.description: Actions the agent has received but not yet executed.

action_results.description: Results of actions the agent has completed since the last check-in.

offline_queue_depth.description: Number of payloads still queued for retry.
